name: CDC Small Business Finance
description_short: CDC Small Business Finance is a personal lending provider based in San Diego, California. Rated 4.0/5 with 64 Google reviews, reflecting strong customer satisfaction.
description_long:
CDC Small Business Finance is a personal lending provider serving clients in San Diego, California. Carrying a 4.0/5.0 Google rating from 64 reviews, CDC Small Business Finance has an strong reputation among consumers in the San Diego area looking to secure personal loans with competitive terms.

CDC Small Business Finance specializes in personal lending services designed to help consumers secure personal loans with competitive terms. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Personal loan providers in San Diego vary significantly in terms of APR ranges, loan amounts, fees, and eligibility requirements. When comparing options, consumers should pay attention to the total cost of the loan including origination fees, prepayment penalties, and the effective APR. CDC Small Business Finance competes in a market where transparency and competitive rates are increasingly important to borrowers who have multiple lending options available.

Consumers in the San Diego, California area who are considering CDC Small Business Finance should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any personal lending provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
